meta.title: WillChain – Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.description: WillChain – automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_title: WillChain – Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When You're Gone – Your Assets Go to Your Designated Heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people pass away without leaving a successor for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the money exists – but cannot access it. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Crypto After You're Gone?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it – until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one who knows the private key, your funds disappear forever when you pass. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency sit untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – unusable by anyone.
problem.card3_desc: Even knowing funds exist, without the key or password, family members can't access them. It's a legal dead end.

recycle.hint: If a wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and hasn't designated an heir – anyone can initiate the recycling of funds and receive 1% as a reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – Not Yet Abandoned (Total timeout not reached)

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps – and your crypto is protected
how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another holder. Your digital will becomes active as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your assets after your prolonged inactivity or death. This could be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If the wallet hasn't been used for a while – manually click 'I'm Here!'.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity the WillChain mechanism triggers: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. Then, there's a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

credits.label: Trust
credits.title: Why Trust WillChain?
credits.subtitle: Transparency, security, and reliability – not just words, but proven facts.
credits.opensource_desc: All code is published on GitHub. Anyone can verify that the contract does exactly what it promises.
credits.audit_desc: The contract has been audited across 4 categories: protocol, security, UX, and operations. All identified issues have been resolved.
credits.tests_desc: Hardhat, Foundry fuzz, bot, frontend – every change is automatically tested before deployment.
credits.network_desc: Built on Base – a network by Coinbase. Transactions cost less than $0.01 and confirm in seconds.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir can access your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in to the website daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely inactive.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this anytime. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days; those with long-term investments choose 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the timeframe expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is designated or they don't claim in time – the funds are recycled: 47% is burned forever, 47% is distributed to WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you – with your private key – can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. The blockchain only stores your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract deployed?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does the auto-timer reset work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any outgoing transaction. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (e.g., Safe) where a relayer executes transactions, you need to manually confirm your activity via the website button.
faq.q8: Can a DEX or dApp approval affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token allowances do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – a transfer, calling confirmActivity(), or configuring the vault – count as presence confirmation. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will trigger even with active DEX allowances.
faq.q9: Can I designate an heir who has already designated me?
faq.a9: No. The contract prohibits circular inheritance chains (A→B and B→A simultaneously). This prevents a situation where both wallets lock each other out. If you wish to be mutual heirs, use an intermediate third address.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as presence confirmation: token transfers, activity confirmations, or vault configuration. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please review before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, equity in the company, or any rights typically associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool for clearing the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value appreciation. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user bears full responsibility for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmations before the set deadline. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network upgrades. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: The user is obligated to independently verify that using WillChain does not conflict with the laws of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.
